description:
Automatic Windows HDR Switching For Any Application.

PyAutoActions automates HDR management for your games and applications, enabling and disabling HDR based on the process status.
Changes:
- Added message box that displays current refresh rate set and command arg set.
- Added enable refresh rate switching message box when user tries to set refresh rate when it is disabled globally.
- Updated libraries.
- Updated Python to v3.14.5
